chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The Laudation before the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/64)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/64)
text: إِلَّا أَنَّهُ قَالَ ثُمَّ الثَّنَاءُ ثُمَّ الِاعْتِرَافُ بِالذَّنْبِ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Ibn Fazzal, from Sa’alba, from Muawiya Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, similar to it except that he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Then the laudation, then the acknowledgement of the sin’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ibn Faddal from Tha’labah from Mu’awiyah ibn ‘Ammar the following: “Mu’awiyah ibn ‘Ammar has narrated from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) a similar Hadith except that he said, ‘Then praising and confessing sins.’”
